column1: # Mapping from fiber demand to model entities
# Fiber demand is routed via food buses: cotton-lint (a byproduct of
# cotton ginning) flows to per-country fiber demand stores.
# Uses FAOSTAT QCL production data (not FBS)
# tracked in FBS as it is not a food commodity.
#   - source_item: model food entity the fiber link draws from
#   - qcl_element_code: FAOSTAT QCL element code (5510 = Production)
